channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Court awards R8.9 million to injured security manager for loss of earnings and medical costs
item.description: A Pietermaritzburg High Court acting judge has ordered the Road Accident Fund (RAF) to compensate a security company branch manager, Ravesh Maharaj, with R8,908,500 following injuries sustained in a m...

item.title: Atiku urges ADC to prioritise competence in 2027 presidential selection
item.description: Former Vice President Atiku Abubakar has urged the African Democratic Congress (ADC) to prioritise competence, national spread, and governance capacity as it prepares for the 2027 presidential electio...

item.title: How advisors are combining ETFs to strengthen fixed-income portfolios
item.description: Over the past few years, changes in global interest rate environments have reshaped fixed-income investing, creating both new opportunities and new challenges for financial advisors. Higher yields hav...

item.title: How everyday Filipino-Japanese ties underpin Marcos’ Japan state visit
item.description: The article reflects on the deeper social foundations behind President Ferdinand Marcos Jr.’s state visit to Japan, which marks 70 years of normalized Philippines–Japan relations. While official discu...

item.title: Chinese tourist rescued after becoming stranded on Table Mountain during evening hike
item.description: A 22-year-old Chinese tourist was safely rescued on Saturday night after becoming stranded on Table Mountain while celebrating her birthday with a hike along the India Venster route. The hiker began h...

item.title: Artificial Intelligence Becomes a Major Topic at the 2026 Cannes Film Festival
item.description: Artificial intelligence emerged as one of the dominant themes at the 2026 Cannes Film Festival, reflecting how rapidly AI technologies are influencing the global film industry. According to reports di...

item.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 schedule, groups and host stadium details announced
item.description: The FIFA World Cup 2026 will be held from June 11 to July 19, 2026, marking the first time the tournament is jointly hosted by three countries — the United States, Mexico and Canada. The competition w...

item.title: On This Day: South Africans summit Everest and key historical events across centuries
item.description: This 'On This Day' historical roundup for 25 May highlights a wide range of significant global and South African-linked events spanning several centuries. One of the standout moments for South Africa ...

item.title: Makati Business Club urges senators to uphold independence and credibility amid Sara Duterte impeachment trial
item.description: The Makati Business Club (MBC), one of the Philippines’ major business organizations, called on senators to maintain an independent and credible leadership in the Senate while it serves as the impeach...

item.title: Government to investigate additional nursery charges despite free childcare scheme
item.description: The UK government is preparing to launch an investigation into hidden childcare costs faced by families in England, despite the expansion of free childcare schemes. Education Secretary Bridget Phillip...

item.title: Authorities investigate after child’s body is discovered in river in Tanzania
item.description: Authorities in Tanzania have opened a full investigation after the body of a child was found floating in a river in a badly decomposed condition. The incident, reported on May 25, 2026, was first noti...

item.title: Arsenal supporter spends KSh 90,000 on group Chinese dining to celebrate Premier League win
item.description: An Arsenal supporter has gone viral after reportedly hosting a lavish celebration meal worth KSh 90,000 for himself and his friends following Arsenal’s victory in the English Premier League (EPL). The...

item.title: Legal experts warn Alberta separation process would create major constitutional and economic uncertainty
item.description: A CTV News report examines the growing debate around Alberta separatism and the legal complications that could arise if the province were to pursue separation from Canada. The article highlights comme...

item.title: Doctors caution about rising online misinformation about menopause
item.description: Health professionals are warning about a rapidly growing wave of online misinformation surrounding menopause, highlighting concerns that inaccurate or misleading content is increasingly shaping how pe...

item.title: Clashes and protests in Spain after police use force on returning Gaza flotilla activists at Bilbao airport
item.description: In Spain, strong public reaction has emerged after clashes between Basque police and activists linked to a Gaza aid flotilla at Bilbao airport. Around two thousand people staged a protest in Bilbao on...

item.title: France promotes STEM education and career opportunities for Nigerian students at France Alumni Day in Lagos
item.description: French government officials and Nigerian alumni have encouraged more Nigerian students to consider France for higher education, especially in Science, Technology, Engineering and Mathematics (STEM)-re...

item.title: Early Beach Photos of Norma Jeane (Marilyn Monroe) With Her Dog Ruffles in 1947
item.description: This article highlights a series of rare vintage photographs taken in 1947 showing Norma Jeane Dougherty, who would later become internationally known as Marilyn Monroe, during a relaxed day at the be...

item.title: Critical review of Errol Flynn biography explores Hollywood fame, racism, and sexual violence allegations
item.description: This article reviews Patricia O’Brien’s biography of Australian Hollywood star Errol Flynn, situating his life within the cultural and racial assumptions of the early to mid-20th century. Flynn, one o...

item.title: How Catholic nuns are navigating social media visibility and historical tensions between autonomy and Church authority
item.description: Catholic nuns and religious sisters are increasingly visible on social media platforms such as TikTok, Instagram and podcasts, where they share insights into their daily routines, beliefs and motivati...

item.title: Maina Kageni settles KSh 1 million bet after Arsenal clinch Premier League title
item.description: Veteran Kenyan radio presenter Maina Kageni has honoured a KSh 1 million bet he made with Nakuru businessman Sam Mburu after Arsenal were officially crowned the 2025/26 English Premier League champion...
